title: Claude Mythos 5 + Fable 5 Are Here And The Numbers Are INSANE
summary: Anthropic has released the Claude Mythos 5 model family and Fable 5, a variant with built-in guardrails. Both models are now generally available with impressive performance metrics. Fable 5 is being offered at no extra cost through June 22 on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans, with pricing expected to shift to usage credits afterward.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of the Claude Mythos 5 model family alongside Fable 5, a variant that ships with built-in guardrails. Both models are now generally available, and the discussion centers on their reported performance metrics. Fable 5 is available at no extra cost through June 22 on the Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans, with pricing expected to move to usage credits afterward. The walkthrough also touches on guardrails and model compression as part of the release.
